mapper.sql: CASE o.status WHEN 0 THEN 'PENDING' WHEN 1 THEN 'CONFIRMED' WHEN 2 THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE 'CANCELLED' END
CASE t.category WHEN 0 THEN 'EXPRESS' WHEN 1 THEN 'STUDY' WHEN 2 THEN 'SECOND_HAND' WHEN 3 THEN 'TEAM_UP' ELSE 'OTHER' END

choose.when: AND o.status = 2 AND t.category != 3 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_review r WHERE r.order_id = o.id AND r.reviewer_id = #{userId} )

mapper.sql: CASE WHEN t.status = 1 THEN 'PENDING_CONFIRM' WHEN t.status = 2 THEN 'IN_PROGRESS' WHEN t.status = 3 THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN t.status = 4 THEN 'CANCELLED' ELSE 'OPEN' END
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_order ( task_id, poster_id, helper_id, status, version ) VALUES ( #{taskId}, #{posterId}, #{helperId}, #{status}, #{version} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, poster_id, helper_id, status, version, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM t_order WHERE id = #{orderId} AND is_deleted = false LIMIT 1
SELECT id, task_id, poster_id, helper_id, status, version, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM t_order WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND is_deleted = false AND status IN (0, 1)

SELECT o.id AS orderId, t.id AS taskId, t.title AS taskTitle, t.description AS taskDescription, AS taskCategory, AS taskStatus, t.location AS taskLocation, t.reward, AS status, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_review r WHERE r.order_id = o.id AND r.reviewer_id = #{viewerId} ) AS currentUserReviewed, t.team_total_members AS teamTotalMembers, t.team_current_members AS teamCurrentMembers, poster.id AS posterId, poster.nickname AS posterName, poster.avatar_url AS posterAvatarUrl, poster.credit_score AS posterCreditScore, helper.id AS helperId, helper.nickname AS helperName, helper.avatar_url AS helperAvatarUrl, helper.credit_score AS helperCreditScore, o.create_time AS createdAt, o.update_time AS updatedAt FROM t_order o JOIN t_task t ON t.id = o.task_id AND t.is_deleted = false JOIN u_user poster ON poster.id = o.poster_id AND poster.is_deleted = false JOIN u_user helper ON helper.id = o.helper_id AND helper.is_deleted = false WHERE o.id = #{orderId} AND o.is_deleted = false LIMIT 1

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_task t WHERE t.publisher_id = #{userId} AND t.status = 0 AND t.is_deleted = false) AS waitingAcceptance, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_order o JOIN t_task t ON t.id = o.task_id AND t.is_deleted = false JOIN u_user poster ON poster.id = o.poster_id AND poster.is_deleted = false JOIN u_user helper ON helper.id = o.helper_id AND helper.is_deleted = false WHERE o.is_deleted = false AND (o.poster_id = #{userId} OR o.helper_id = #{userId}) AND o.status = 0 ) AS pending, ((SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_order o JOIN t_task t ON t.id = o.task_id AND t.is_deleted = false JOIN u_user poster ON poster.id = o.poster_id AND poster.is_deleted = false JOIN u_user helper ON helper.id = o.helper_id AND helper.is_deleted = false WHERE o.is_deleted = false AND (o.poster_id = #{userId} OR o.helper_id = #{userId}) AND o.status = 1 AND t.status != 4 AND (t.category != 3 OR o.helper_id = #{userId})) + (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_task t WHERE t.publisher_id = #{userId} AND t.category = 3 AND t.status = 2 AND t.is_deleted = false)) AS inProgress, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_order o JOIN t_task t ON t.id = o.task_id AND t.is_deleted = false JOIN u_user poster ON poster.id = o.poster_id AND poster.is_deleted = false JOIN u_user helper ON helper.id = o.helper_id AND helper.is_deleted = false WHERE o.is_deleted = false AND (o.poster_id = #{userId} OR o.helper_id = #{userId}) AND o.status = 2 AND t.category != 3 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_review r WHERE r.order_id = o.id AND r.reviewer_id = #{userId} )) AS waitingReview, ((SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_order o JOIN t_task t ON t.id = o.task_id AND t.is_deleted = false JOIN u_user poster ON poster.id = o.poster_id AND poster.is_deleted = false JOIN u_user helper ON helper.id = o.helper_id AND helper.is_deleted = false WHERE o.is_deleted = false AND (o.poster_id = #{userId} OR o.helper_id = #{userId}) AND o.status = 2 AND (t.category != 3 OR o.helper_id = #{userId})) + (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_task t WHERE t.publisher_id = #{userId} AND t.category = 3 AND t.status = 3 AND t.is_deleted = false)) AS completed
mapper.update: UPDATE t_order SET status = 3, version = version + 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND is_deleted = false AND status IN (0, 1)
UPDATE t_order SET status = 2, version = version + 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND is_deleted = false AND status = 1
UPDATE t_order SET status = 3, version = version + 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND is_deleted = false AND status = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_order WHERE helper_id = #{userId} AND status = 2 AND is_deleted = false
